final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: luxury beauty advertisement, social media promotional image
Primary request: high-end skincare serum advertisement with rose petals and water splash
Scene/backdrop: soft pink gradient background, clean and airy studio feel
Subject: glass serum bottle with pale golden liquid visible through transparent body, surrounded by scattered rose petals and dynamic water droplets mid-splash
Style/medium: photorealistic product photography, luxury editorial
Composition/framing: centered product shot, slight low angle to emphasize elegance, shallow depth of field
Lighting/mood: soft natural diffused light, gentle highlights on glass surface, warm and refined atmosphere
Color palette: soft blush pink gradient background + warm pale gold liquid + ivory and deep rose petal tones + clear water droplets
Materials/textures: smooth transparent glass with subtle reflections, silky liquid sheen, delicate rose petal texture, glistening water splash
Constraints: keep the serum bottle as the hero product; rose petals and water droplets as supporting elements only; no human hands or faces
Avoid: harsh shadows, cluttered background, plastic-looking bottle, oversaturated colors
